scripts.dev:backend: poetry --directory fastapi-products-backend run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir fastapi-products-backend --env-file fastapi-products-backend/.env
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix laptops-frontend" "poetry --directory fastapi-products-backend run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --app-dir fastapi-products-backend --env-file fastapi-products-backend/.env"
